channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "They Will Take Out Gun": Russian Foreign Minister Warns Journalist At Delhi Briefing

media:content.media:description: Russia's Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov was addressing a press conference in New Delhi

item.description: The interaction was interrupted multiple times by a journalist who was allegedly speaking on the phone while Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov was answering questions.
item.content:encoded: The interaction was interrupted multiple times by a journalist who was allegedly speaking on the phone while Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov was answering questions.

item.title: Ex-Imam Faked Spiritual Powers To Rape Girls In London, Gets Life Sentence

media:content.media:description: He was found guilty of 21 sexual offences, including rape, sexual assault and child sexual offences

item.description: Abdul Halim Khan pretended to have spiritual powers to coerce and sexually abuse girls as young as 12, a Metropolitan Police investigation revealed.
item.content:encoded: Abdul Halim Khan pretended to have spiritual powers to coerce and sexually abuse girls as young as 12, a Metropolitan Police investigation revealed.

item.title: "Thought He Could Hide": Trump Says Top ISIS Leader Abu-Bilal Killed
item.description: US Kills ISIS "Second-In-Command" Globally Abu-Bilal-Al-Minuki In Africa, Says Donald Trump
item.content:encoded: US Kills ISIS "Second-In-Command" Globally Abu-Bilal-Al-Minuki In Africa, Says Donald Trump

item.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Israel, Lebanon Extend Ceasfire, Trump Plans More Iran Strikes
item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.

item.title: "Spiral Of Annihilation": Pope Leo XIV On Rise Of AI-directed Warfare

media:content.media:description: Pope Leo has identified AI as one of the most critical matters facing humanity.

item.description: Pope Leo XIV denounced how military spending had increased dramatically this year, especially in Europe, at the expense of education and healthcare
item.content:encoded: Pope Leo XIV denounced how military spending had increased dramatically this year, especially in Europe, at the expense of education and healthcare

item.title: Germany's Friedrich Merz Says Wouldn't Advise "His Children" To Move To US

media:content.media:description: Germany's relationship with the US has become increasingly strained under Trump's administration.

item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said Friday he would not advise young people in his country to move to the United States for study or work, in the latest sign of...
item.content:encoded: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said Friday he would not advise young people in his country to move to the United States for study or work, in the latest sign of...

item.title: $200,000 Reward On US Ex-Air Force Specialist Accused Of Spying For Iran

media:content.media:description: The Texas native defected to Iran in 2013 after being invited to two all-expense-paid conferences.

item.description: Monica Witt served in the Air Force between 1997 and 2008, where she was trained in the Farsi language and was deployed overseas on classified counterintelligence missions.
item.content:encoded: Monica Witt served in the Air Force between 1997 and 2008, where she was trained in the Farsi language and was deployed overseas on classified counterintelligence missions.

item.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang tries Beijing's 'zhajiangmian' on food tour
item.description: The "douzhi'er," a fermented soybean drink that's slightly sour and gray-green in color, made the Nvidia CEO wince.
item.content:encoded: The "douzhi'er," a fermented soybean drink that's slightly sour and gray-green in color, made the Nvidia CEO wince.

item.title: Trump, Back From China, Preps Big Iran Strikes With Epic Fury 2.0: Report

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump may order resumption of Operation Epic Fury, NYT report said

item.description: The US and China have agreed that "Iran can't have nuclear weapons" and that the Strait of Hormuz must be opened, Donald Trump said
item.content:encoded: The US and China have agreed that "Iran can't have nuclear weapons" and that the Strait of Hormuz must be opened, Donald Trump said

item.title: Why Xi Gave Trump A Rare Tour Of China's Most Guarded Political Compound

media:content.media:description: Trump walked through the compound's carefully maintained gardens, stopping to admire blooming roses

item.description: Zhongnanhai, named after two lakes located within the compound, is not only a workplace but also the residence of China's senior leadership.
item.content:encoded: Zhongnanhai, named after two lakes located within the compound, is not only a workplace but also the residence of China's senior leadership.

item.title: "Nothing From China Allowed": Team Trump Dumps Chinese Passes, Burner Phones

media:content.media:description: This is not the first time friction of this kind has surfaced during a US presidential visit to China.

item.description: While Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping kept up a cordial front on camera, relations between American and Chinese press and security teams were far more strained behind the scenes.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1099869/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>While Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping kept up a cordial front on camera, relations between American and Chinese press and security teams were far more strained behind the scenes.

item.title: Boeing Confirms China Is Buying 200 Planes

media:content.media:description: China's last order from Boeing dates back to 2017.

item.description: Aerospace giant Boeing on Friday confirmed that China had committed to purchasing 200 aircraft, as previously announced by US President Donald Trump during his visit to Beijing.
item.content:encoded: Aerospace giant Boeing on Friday confirmed that China had committed to purchasing 200 aircraft, as previously announced by US President Donald Trump during his visit to Beijing.

item.title: US Plans To Unveil Criminal Charges Against Cuba's Raul Castro Next Week

media:content.media:description: Raul Castro was defense minister during the 1996 plane shootdown incident.

item.description: Castro is the brother of the late Fidel Castro, the revolutionary and longtime foil of the United States who led the island's communist government for decades.
item.content:encoded: Castro is the brother of the late Fidel Castro, the revolutionary and longtime foil of the United States who led the island's communist government for decades.

item.title: Lebanon, Israel Ceasefire Extended By 45 Days: US

media:content.media:description: The ceasefire, already extended, had been due to expire on Sunday.

item.description: Lebanon and Israel on Friday extended a ceasefire for 45 days, despite a new flareup in violence, the US State Department said after mediating talks.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1099898/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Lebanon and Israel on Friday extended a ceasefire for 45 days, despite a new flareup in violence, the US State Department said after mediating talks.

item.title: Trump China Visit LIVE Updates: Live: Trump Leaves China After High-Stake Summit Focused On Iran, Taiwan

media:content.media:description: Trump China Visit Live: Trade ties between Beijing and Washington have been fraught in recent years

item.description: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.

item.title: Israel Carries Out Strikes In Gaza, Targets Hamas Chief

media:content.media:description: Israel said it had targeted the head of Hamas' armed wing with a strike in Gaza on Friday.

item.description: Israel said on Friday that it carried out a strike in Gaza targeting Ezzedine Al-Haddad, who it described as chief of the armed wing of Palestinian movement Hamas.
item.content:encoded: Israel said on Friday that it carried out a strike in Gaza targeting Ezzedine Al-Haddad, who it described as chief of the armed wing of Palestinian movement Hamas.

item.title: Trump, Xi And A Room Full Of Men. US-China Summit Photos Trigger Outrage

media:content.media:description: The visuals have triggered widespread backlash and a global debate regarding gender representation

item.description: Gita Gopinath, an economics professor at Harvard University, took to X and described the all-male optics as, "A painting of the end of meritocracy: A meeting of the two largest economies and not one woman at the table."
item.content:encoded: Gita Gopinath, an economics professor at Harvard University, took to X and described the all-male optics as, "A painting of the end of meritocracy: A meeting of the two largest economies and not one woman at the table."

item.title: "Not Looking To Have Wars": Trump's Message To Taiwan After Talks With Xi

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump went to Beijing for a two-day summit with Xi Jinping.

item.description: Trump's comments come after he discussed the flashpoint issue of Taiwan's independence with his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping in Beijing.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1099924/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Trump's comments come after he discussed the flashpoint issue of Taiwan's independence with his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping in Beijing.

item.title: Trump Leaves China With Big Claims, Few Details And No Confirmation

media:content.media:description: Despite the sweeping claims from the US side, Chinese officials offered little public confirmation

item.description: Speaking before departing China, Trump said the meetings had resulted in "fantastic trade deals" and settled "a lot of different problems" in his meetings with China's Xi Jinping this week.
item.content:encoded: Speaking before departing China, Trump said the meetings had resulted in "fantastic trade deals" and settled "a lot of different problems" in his meetings with China's Xi Jinping this week.

item.title: "Favour To Pakistan": Trump Reveals Why US Backed Ceasefire With Iran

media:content.media:description: The US president reiterated his decision that he does not allow Iran to acquire nuclear weapons

item.description: The US president reiterated his decision that he does not allow Iran to acquire nuclear weapons and that Tehran should give up the enriched uranium that it has accumulated over the years.
item.content:encoded: The US president reiterated his decision that he does not allow Iran to acquire nuclear weapons and that Tehran should give up the enriched uranium that it has accumulated over the years.
